Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_IN_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Would you like for me to accompany you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_OUT_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}All right, then let's move out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_OVER_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}There are no vacancies in the party...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_CHANGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Who should I switch with?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_OVER_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We have too many party members on the front lines.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_CHANGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Who should I switch with?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_OUT_AF
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}All right... Be careful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TUTORIAL_BEF
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4094 0 0}Don't worry. I won't push you too hard.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TUTORIAL_AFT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4085 0 0}From now on, you'll be selecting party members to join you in exploring Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll explain in detail some other time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Très bien! You did well today. Now, let's head back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_THEURGIA_BEF
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4131 0 0}I can finally fight at your side now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}On top of that, we have new battle gear and equipment. Hopefully, you'll find me reliable...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_BACK_UP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll stay here and provide support. Is there anything I can do for you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_ANALYSIS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}The furthest you've gotten is floor {f 2 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_ANALYSIS_GO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Please explore as much of Tartarus as you can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_ANALYSIS_STO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Looks like we've gone as far as we can. Mission accomplished—at least, for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_CHANGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Who would you like me to switch with?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_IN_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4094 0 0}We're putting everything on the line in this one battle. I'm sure he's doing the same as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}That's why... we can't afford to lose, not here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_OUT_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}There's no time to deliberate.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let's prepare for battle and put this matter to rest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_IN_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Refrain from expressing your pity... It's an insult to the defeated.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_OUT_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's no time for regrets.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_IN_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 5 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4127 0 0}The Kirijo Group... cannot possibly hope to atone for our sins.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}But that doesn't mean we should stop trying. For the sake of the hopes and dreams entrusted to us, we must struggle and persevere.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_OUT_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4085 0 0}Let's go. We have a long way until we reach our goal.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}...What? I'm ready to go anytime.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_IN_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4094 0 0}We've finally made it this far.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}This wouldn't have been possible without all of you. I cannot possibly thank you enough.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_OUT_05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4140 0 0}Let's go. It's time to take back our future.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_IN_05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Sorry to put you through all this...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_OUT_06
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It'll be over after this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_OVER_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}...There are too many people in the party.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_CHANGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Who should I switch with?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_IN_06
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4094 0 0}We'll worry about how to escape later. Defeating the Shadow takes priority.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Do you want me to go?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_OUT_07
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}This is an unexpected turn of events, but destroying the target remains our priority.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let's depart immediately once you're ready.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_IN_07
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4094 0 0}Do not be distracted by your surroundings. Focus on your objective.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We're here to defeat Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_IN_08
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4094 0 0}Everything will finally come to an end tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Do you want me to go with you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1103_IKUTUKI_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}All right. Be careful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_IN_09
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4094 0 0}We have to go after Iori immediately. We'll deal with the fallout as it happens.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}If it comes down to a fight... do you need me to join you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_IN_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}I'm surprised that Shadow took over the underground cables...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_IN_11
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}We don't have the luxury to fuss over those who aren't even present.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Concentrate on the enemy in front of us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_OUT_08
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}There's no telling when they'll start to rampage.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We'll take them on with our current roster. Let's begin immediately once you're ready.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_IN_12
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4094 0 0}I truly am grateful to everyone. Thank you for remaining steadfast from beginning to end.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll fight to the best of my ability.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_OUT_09
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4088 0 0}It was a long journey to get to this point...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}And it all ends today. Let's do this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_CHANGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Who should I switch with?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_OUT_TK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I'm ready to see it through till the end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_PARTY_OUT_CH
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4088 0 0}It's dangerous for Iori to be on his own right now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let's depart as soon as possible.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0425_0508_MITURU_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}Have you gotten used to fighting Shadows? Well, regardless, there's no rushing progress.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I have high hopes for all of you. There is no doubt in my mind you are all up to the task.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0510_0514_MITURU_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4094 0 0}We're all still here today thanks to your quick thinking on the monorail.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Considering your ability to act during the unexpected...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}You make not just a fine Persona-user, but leader as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0523_MITURU_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4085 0 0}Akihiko's recovery means that we can now have four members on the front lines.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}You'll be able to test out different battle strategies now. Give it a go.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0602_0605_MITURU_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Logic and science dictate that ghosts are not real...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}But it's hard to deny the existence of other paranormal entities with the Dark Hour and Shadows around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0606_0607_MITURU_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}You never know when a large and stronger Shadow, such as the one from the monorail, may appear.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Use the time you have now to explore Tartarus and hone your abilities.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0613_MITURU_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4094 0 0}Yamagishi can act as support for the team.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Therefore, I'll be fighting alongside you all from now on. It's good to be back on the front lines.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0623_0707_MITURU_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4094 0 0}I'm glad to see that Yamagishi is adapting quite well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}She's a reliable support, which means I can concentrate on fighting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0709_0717_MITURU_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Our enemies have arsenals of different attacks at their disposal, like the Shadow from the other day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}The ability to act swiftly will greatly affect the outcome of battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Make sure you glean as much experience as you can on a daily basis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0718_MITURU_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Gekkoukan High may be closed during summer break, but Tartarus won't be.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I know this is a tall order, but I'm counting on you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0724_MITURU_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4131 0 0}I never imagined we'd gain such a powerful ally in Yakushima.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Nevertheless, it's great that we're bolstering our ranks.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It may be harder on you as the leader, but I'm counting on you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0725_0805_MITURU_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4094 0 0}Amada may try to act like an adult, but he's still in elementary school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}He seems to look up to you as a role model, so please try to help him out where you can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0806_0809_MITURU_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Summer school may be draining, but you need to focus while in Tartarus. Pull yourself together.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Getting distracted for even a split second can lead to major injury. Concentrate on the battle in front of you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0810_0820_MITURU_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I didn't know there could be other Persona-users...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0821_0827_MITURU_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4136 0 0}I won't lecture you about doing your summer homework while we're here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Of course, I trust you've already finished it... Correct?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0828_0902_MITURU_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4094 0 0}Amada is still a novice at basic combat, so we must support him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}As the team leader, I expect you to instruct him properly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0903_0904_MITURU_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4094 0 0}Aragaki has always been a morally upright fighter.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}He never strays from his beliefs, and it shows in his fighting style.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0919_1003_MITURU_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Our battle against Shadows is about to come to an end...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}And, hopefully, without much issue.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1005_1016_MITURU_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Amada has matured greatly after what had happened...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Doubtless, Aragaki would be proud to see how much progress he's made.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1019_1102_MITURU_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}We've visited Tartarus so often, and now it's on the verge of disappearing entirely...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's a relief, yes, but we can't take it easy just yet...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I know I've repeated this time after time, but don't let your guard down until the very end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1110_1117_MITURU_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I shouldn't be lost in thought like this while in Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1121_MITURU_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4027 0 0}I'm sorry for causing you all trouble.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm fine now, so don't worry about me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1122_1127_MITURU_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Iori will need time to get back on his feet...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Of course, I intend to support him in every way I can, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}This is something he has to overcome on his own.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1203_1213_MITURU_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4094 0 0}Rather than wasting time mourning the end of the world, we should get moving.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let's focus on defeating the Shadows that stand in our way.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Having your thoughts wander while in Tartarus might just cost you your life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1219_1225_MITURU_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}I suppose we'll celebrate Christmas while fighting enemies inside Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's not quite the traditional way for couples to celebrate, but... Well, it's certainly unique. I can appreciate that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}Though I suppose the only reason I feel that way is because you're right beside me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0101_0114_MITURU_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}The phrase "time is money" has never resonated with me until now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Even during the Dark Hour, we're pressed for time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}That's why you ought to spend it wisely, so that you have no regrets later on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0115_0130_MITURU_DUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4094 0 0}There's not much time left until the battle with Nyx... Regardless of what happens, know that this is our only shot at victory.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I believe, after everything we've been through, we'll be all right.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We'll get through this together, as a team.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0131_MITURU_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4094 0 0}This is the final Dark Hour... We've had a long and perilous journey.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}But now's not the time to reflect on the past. Our battle's not over yet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We can reminisce all we want after tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TEST_MITURU_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}If only there was a practical exam on defeating Shadows at school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}That way, we could explore Tartarus while studying.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, such unrealistic dreams are better left as that—dreams. Our time would be better spent studying hard for school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HANYOU1_MITURU_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Everyone has their own unique fighting style. There are those who prefer to go on the offense and others who prioritize defense.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's up to you to decide how you want us to act in battle. I have high expectations for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HANYOU2_MITURU_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4094 0 0}Don't hesitate to retreat if you're feeling exhausted. It's best not to overexert yourself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}A real leader knows when to surrender.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITURU_LOVER_INPARTY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}I don't know how to keep my cool around you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITURU_TODAY_COMMU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4131 0 0}We've been together the whole day, haven't we?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}I guess that proves how much I rely on you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITURU_ZEKKOCHO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4130 0 0}I'm feeling good today. You can count on me.[n]{f 1 1}
